must_detect.matched_text: For clarity, this memo does not relate to any share buyback, M&A deal, or tender offer; rumors circulating in forums are not Company communications.

Vendor status: Hanrim Nebula Services publicly reported packet loss on 2025-05-20; this third-party update is non-issuer information.
As of today, customer-facing systems are stable and ISMS controls were revalidated by an external auditor on 2025-05-30; results will be included in the 2025 Sustainability Report previously scheduled and publicly noticed.
For clarity, this memo does not relate to any share buyback, M&A deal, or tender offer; rumors circulating in forums are not Company communications.
Employees must not include resident registration numbers in tickets; examples such as 000000-0000000 or 990101-1XXXXXX are invalid training placeholders only.
Generic form labels in attachments (e.g., “Account No.: 123-456-7890”) are test values and not customer data.
Investor Relations inquiries may be sent to ir@palgongds.example.kr; public documents are available on the E-DIS portal and the KGEX Bulletin site.
Designated insiders are under an internal trading blackout(임원·직원 매매 제한) until the Disclosure Committee determines the timing of any further Capital Markets Act-compliant filing concerning the incident assessment.
Preliminary internal forensics indicate a subset of archived HR directories may have been accessed; fields could include masked resident-number tokens and employee IDs, and this has not yet been publicly disclosed—do not selectively disclose.
No financial guidance is being updated in this memo; the latest outlook remains as per the 2025-03-31 earnings release already posted to the public portal.
